Document:
# Skeletons
Skeletons are undead humanoids that have emerged from closets and other forgotten areas of the station. They can speak, move freely, and interact with the station like any humanoid crew member, though they are [bold]not alive[/bold] in any biological sense.
As a skeleton you are [bold]immune to biological hazards[/bold] such as toxins, radiation, and suffocation. You do not need to eat or drink, which allows you to move freely through areas that would harm biological crew members.
You have [bold]no assigned objectives[/bold]. What you do during the shift is entirely up to you.
## Variants
- [bold]Closet Skeleton[/bold]: a skeleton in standard passenger clothing, found inside a closet. - [bold]Skeleton Pirate[/bold]: a skeleton equipped with pirate gear. - [bold]Skeleton Biker[/bold]: a skeleton equipped with biker gear.
